summary: Iteration 6 frontend-only verification of fully-static Spider Web themed school website with added micro-interactions. All 15 review items PASS. Zero /api/* network requests from any form (admissions, contact, newsletter) — confirmed via request listener. Zero console errors on initial load. Static events e1..e5 all render inside data-testid='events-section'. 5 story cards render. Hero word-by-word reveal: 10 .word-rise elements detected. Hero count-up values 50, 94, 18:1 reached after 2.5s. Scroll-thread bar grows as page scrolls (0% → 25.3% at scrollY=2000). Magnetic hero-apply-btn wrapper gets translate(4.38px, 3.66px) on mouse near-hover. 3D tilt on program-0 inner div = perspective(900px) rotateY(-3.99deg) rotateX(3.80deg) translateY(-4px). Click on .btn-ripple (hero-tour-btn) spawns a .ripple-dot. Timeline section present. /programs/lower-school loads and back button returns to /. Cross-route apply flow: clicking program-apply-btn navigates to / and scrolls admissions to top=-0.4375px (matches iter5 behaviour).
critical_code_review_comments: Newsletter.jsx still uses async/await + setTimeout(500) to simulate latency — fine, but the 'loading' state could be removed entirely since there is no real request anymore. Keeping it is acceptable UX (prevents double-click).
Sections.jsx Admissions/Contact handlers likely follow the same mock-latency pattern — confirmed no axios/fetch anywhere in /app/frontend/src (grep returned empty). Good.

STATIC_EVENTS array (Sections.jsx:285) produces ids e1..e5 — matches the new contract in the review_request. Note: event ids are now content-stable across reloads so downstream Playwright selectors can safely hardcode them.

useMagnetic/useTilt attach listeners to element refs that sit INSIDE the data-testid container (wrapper div for hero buttons; inner .preserve-3d div for program cards). Testing agents should target the wrapper/inner element, not the testid itself, when asserting style.transform — this is a minor gotcha worth documenting for the next test iteration.

useCountUp uses IntersectionObserver threshold 0.5 — values only animate when the hero stat is >=50% in viewport. On very tall viewports this is fine; on viewport <600px tall some stats may not animate until a small scroll — consider threshold 0.2 for safety.
Ripple lifetime is 700ms (setTimeout). For users doing rapid repeat clicks, many span nodes can briefly stack in DOM (leaves up to ~14 dots if spamming). Not a leak but consider throttling in future.

success_rate.backend: skipped (review_request: frontend only; backend intentionally unused)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth on this site
seed_data_creation: Zero DB writes this iteration — all three forms confirmed to make ZERO /api/* calls despite successful form submissions with toast messages. No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://web-academy-design.preview.emergentagent.com. Site is fully static (iter-6): NO axios, NO fetch, NO /api/* calls from any user flow. All forms show toasts via mock setTimeout: admissions='Inquiry received', contact='Thanks — we'll be in touch soon.', newsletter='Welcome to the thread.'. Event ids are e1..e5 (not UUIDs). Interaction hooks live in /app/frontend/src/lib/interactions.js — when asserting transforms in Playwright, query the WRAPPER div (parent of data-testid) for hero buttons, or the inner .preserve-3d div for program cards. Use page.mouse.move with steps=10 to reliably trigger mousemove on these refs (single-shot move may be dropped by React's event system). ScrollThread bar selector: [data-testid='scroll-thread'] > div > div — width is inline-style percent.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — iteration is green. Prior cross-route scroll bug (iter-4→5) remains fixed at admissions top=-0.4375px after navigate-and-scroll.
